weeks.description: Understand variables, loops, lists, dicts, and functions in Python.
weeks.importance: Crucial for writing automated data scripts and basic manipulation.

weeks.description: Master SELECT, WHERE, JOIN, GROUP BY, and basic aggregations in SQL.
weeks.importance: Essential for querying and extracting data from databases.

weeks.description: Study Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, and basic statistics functions.
weeks.importance: Widely used for quick data cleaning, modeling, and analysis.

weeks.description: Build interactive charts, filters, and a dashboard in Tableau.
weeks.importance: Important for communicating insights visually to business stakeholders.

weeks.description: Connect data sources and build data models and reports in Power BI.
weeks.importance: A standard and powerful business intelligence platform tool.

weeks.description: Understand mean, median, mode, standard deviation, and hypothesis testing.
weeks.importance: Forms the analytical backbone of data decision-making.

weeks.description: Practice presenting data insights clearly and writing summaries.
weeks.importance: Key to bridging the gap between technical data and business impact.
